hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"[Trading-System -- active rules] READ ORDER: 1) CLAUDE.md (entry) 2) .ai/MEMORY.md (canonical memory) 3) MEMORY.md (working state). NON-NEGOTIABLE RULES: S1 graphify (not grep) S2 shared-tier dedup S3 event-driven contracts S4 CQRS DB access S5 no hardcoded secrets. Agents: .ai/agents/*.md | Skills: .ai/skills/*.md"}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"STOP -- search via graphify, not Grep/Glob. Required first attempt: `graphify query \"<concept>\"` (broad), `graphify explain \"<symbol>\"` (single node + neighbors), or `graphify path \"<A>\" \"<B>\"` (relationship). Run those via Bash. Grep/Glob are allowed ONLY as a one-shot verification AFTER graphify pointed you at a symbol -- never as the primary scan. If the graph is missing/stale, `graphify update .` first. CLAUDE.md S1."}}'

if grep -qE '"file_path":[[:space:]]*"(.*[\\/])?shared[\\/]'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Touching shared/ -- any constant/enum/type/Kafka-topic here is visible to ALL layers. Make sure this is truly cross-layer before adding. Review .ai/MEMORY.md for existing conventions."}}'; fi
